metadata.description: claude code plugins, hooks, agents, and resources. all tested

plugins.name: context-handoff
plugins.description: saves your context before claude compresses it. the one hook everyone needs

plugins.name: panopticon
plugins.description: logs every single tool action to sqlite. know exactly what claude did

plugins.name: broadcast
plugins.description: async notifications when claude ships something. slack, discord, wherever — fire and forget

plugins.name: subagent-orchestrator
plugins.description: tracks subagent lifecycle and rebalances work when teammates go idle

plugins.name: session-analytics
plugins.description: tracks session patterns — duration, frequency, time-of-day, which tools you actually use
